indicators.name: Large desk
indicators.rationale: A large desk provides ample space for a computer and other work materials.

indicators.name: Comfortable chairs
indicators.rationale: Comfortable chairs support long periods of sitting, which is essential for computer work.

indicators.name: Natural light from windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light can improve mood and focus during work.

indicators.name: Quiet environment
indicators.rationale: A quiet environment reduces distractions, allowing for more focused work.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for solo computer work due to its ample workspace, comfortable seating, natural lighting, and quiet environment.
